AddClipLayoutRequest.description: Add a layout to a clip

durationMs.description: Optional. Provide together with startTimeMs for a time-ranged layout.

media.description: Optional media content to show during this layout. Only valid on time-ranged layouts.

startTimeMs.description: Optional. Provide together with durationMs for a time-ranged layout.

transitionStyle.description: Optional. Only valid on time-ranged layouts. Defaults to the clip's setting when omitted.

AddClipMaskRequest.description: Add a blur or highlight mask. Always targets the subject screen layer.

AddClipRequest.description: Add a new clip from an uploaded source.

name.description: Clip name. Defaults to the next `Clip N`.

AddClipZoomRequest.description: Add a zoom to the clip's screen layer (does not affect the camera). Use `manualZoom` with a `focusPoint`, or `trackingZoom` to follow the cursor.

type.description: `manualZoom` zooms into a fixed `focusPoint` on the screen. `trackingZoom` automatically follows the cursor in the screen recording.

AddCollaboratorRequest.description: Request body for adding a collaborator to a video

email.description: Email address of the user to add. Must be a member of your workspace.

role.description: Role to grant. Allowed values: 'editor' or 'viewer'.

AddCollaboratorResponse.description: Response after adding a collaborator to a video

AddVideoRequest.description: Request body for adding a video to a playlist

videoId.description: ID of the video to add to the playlist

CameraBubbleLayout.description: Floating camera bubble over the screen recording. Combi (all ratios). Position is 9-way. Set `style: full` to put the screen fullscreen behind the bubble.

screenFit.description: Only honoured when `style: "full"`. Defaults to cover.

style.description: `regular` (default) keeps the screen layered behind the bubble; `full` puts the screen fullscreen behind the bubble (and honours `screenFit`).

CameraBubbleLayout.title: Camera Bubble

CameraOnlyLayout.description: Camera fills the frame or sits centered; the screen is hidden. Combi (all ratios).

punchIn.description: Only honoured when `style: "fullscreen"`. Defaults to false.

shape.description: Required when `style: "middle"`. Allowed shapes vary by ratio (no `portrait` in portrait clips, no `square` in square clips).

style.description: `fullscreen` fills the frame with the camera (optional `punchIn`); `middle` centers a shaped camera (requires `shape`).

CameraOnlyLayout.title: Camera Only

cuts.description: Time ranges cut from the clip's playback

durationSeconds.description: Effective playback duration of the clip after cuts, in seconds

layoutSceneType.description: Determines which layouts can be applied to this clip via `add_layout`. See `BasicSubjectLayoutName`, `CameraSubjectLayoutName`, `CombiLayoutName`.

maxDurationSeconds.description: Total length of the underlying source, in seconds

order.description: Position of the clip within the video

ClipBackground.description: Clip background. Use type = 'solid' with `color`, type = 'image' with `imageUrl`, type = 'video' with `videoUrl` + `videoDurationSeconds`, or type = 'gradient' with `gradientColor1`, `gradientColor2`, `gradientAngle`.

color.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'solid'.

gradientAngle.description: Linear gradient angle in degrees. Required when type = 'gradient'.

gradientColor1.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'gradient'.

gradientColor2.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'gradient'.

videoDurationSeconds.description: Video background duration in seconds. Required when type = 'video'.

ClipBackgroundOutput.description: Clip background. Use type = 'solid' with `color`, type = 'image' with `imageUrl`, type = 'video' with `videoUrl` + `videoDurationSeconds`, or type = 'gradient' with `gradientColor1`, `gradientColor2`, `gradientAngle`.

color.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'solid'.

gradientAngle.description: Linear gradient angle in degrees. Required when type = 'gradient'.

gradientColor1.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'gradient'.

gradientColor2.description: Hex color string. Required when type = 'gradient'.

videoDurationSeconds.description: Video background duration in seconds. Required when type = 'video'.

ClipLayout.description: A layout attached to a clip

durationMs.description: Layout duration in ms. Omitted for clip-spanning layouts.

layout.description: Structured layout for this section. Null when the underlying layout isn't expressible in the public structured shape (e.g. Custom layouts created in the editor).

media.description: Media content for this layout, when set. Null on the base layout and on layouts whose underlying section doesn't carry a media-shaped layer.

startTimeMs.description: Layout start time in ms (clip-relative). Omitted for clip-spanning layouts.

transitionStyle.description: Transition into this layout. Omitted on the base layout, or when the section uses an internal style not exposed via the public API.

ClipLayoutShape.description: Structured layout description, discriminated by `kind`. Valid kinds depend on the clip's `layoutSceneType` and the story's aspect ratio; the server validates the kind+fields and returns a 400 if they don't fit.

ClipMask.description: A blur or highlight mask on a clip

ClipMedia.description: Media shown during a layout. `image` (hosted URL) or `video` (uploaded source).

ClipMediaImage.description: Image media. The image fills the section's layer per the chosen layoutName.

imageUrl.description: URL of a hosted image to show as media.

ClipMediaImage.title: ClipMediaImage

ClipSource.description: An underlying source used by a clip

dimensions.description: Native pixel dimensions of the source.

medium.description: Recording medium (Mic, CameraMic, Screen, ScreenMic, Video, None)

url.description: Direct URL to the source media (when available)

ClipZoom.description: A zoom effect applied to the clip's screen layer (does not affect the camera). Use `manualZoom` with a `focusPoint`, or `trackingZoom` to follow the cursor automatically.

type.description: `manualZoom` zooms into a fixed `focusPoint` on the screen. `trackingZoom` automatically follows the cursor in the screen recording.

role.description: Role to grant. Allowed values: 'editor' or 'viewer'.

CreateEndpointRequest.description: Request body for creating a webhook endpoint

filterTypes.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g., video.created, export.ready)

url.description: The URL where webhook events will be sent

CreateEndpointResponse.description: Response when a webhook endpoint is created

id.description: Unique identifier for the webhook endpoint

secret.description: Signing secret for verifying webhook payloads (shown only once)

CreatePlaylistRequest.description: Request body for creating a new playlist

emoji.description: Unicode emoji character for the playlist

password.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

visibility.description: Share with org or keep personal (default: personal)

CreateSourceRequest.description: Create a new video source upload.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which `uploadUrl` stops accepting uploads.

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed S3 URL. PUT the video bytes here (single PUT, max ~5GB).

Cut.description: A range of time removed from the clip

durationMs.description: Length of the cut, in milliseconds

startTimeMs.description: Start of the cut, in milliseconds from the beginning of the clip

CutClipByTranscriptRequest.description: Cut one or more ranges from the clip by referencing word indices in the uncut transcript. The server resolves each range to exact word `startTimeMs`/`endTimeMs` and merges the resulting cuts.

wordRanges.description: Word ranges to cut. Each range's start and end ms are read directly from the uncut transcript — no padding is applied.

CutClipRequest.description: Cut one or more time ranges from the clip in a single request. Provide either `cuts: [{fromMs, toMs}, ...]` (preferred) or the legacy single-range `fromMs`/`toMs` pair. Overlapping or adjacent ranges are merged into the clip's existing cuts.

cuts.description: Time ranges to cut from the clip. Merged with the clip's existing cuts; overlapping or adjacent ranges are joined.

fromMs.description: Single-range shortcut for `cuts: [{fromMs, toMs}]`. Use `cuts` for multiple ranges.

toMs.description: Single-range shortcut for `cuts: [{fromMs, toMs}]`. Use `cuts` for multiple ranges.

CutClipTranscriptResponse.description: Clip transcript with cuts applied — what viewers hear.

words.description: Words on the playback timeline (cuts removed, times relative to the clip's playback start).

CutOutput.description: A range of time removed from the clip

durationMs.description: Length of the cut, in milliseconds

startTimeMs.description: Start of the cut, in milliseconds from the beginning of the clip

CutRange.description: A single time range to cut from the clip.

fromMs.description: Start of the range to cut, in milliseconds from the clip's start.

toMs.description: End of the range to cut, in milliseconds from the clip's start. Clamped to the clip's max duration.

DeleteEndpointResponse.description: Response when a webhook endpoint is deleted

DuplicateClipRequest.description: Request body for duplicating a clip

name.description: Name for the duplicated clip (defaults to the source clip name)

order.description: Position to insert the new clip (defaults to right after the source)

DuplicateVideoRequest.description: Request body for duplicating a video

name.description: Name for the duplicated video. Defaults to original name with ' (Copy)' suffix.

trim.description: Optional trim parameters. Specify startTime+endTime for time range trim (duration must be at least 1 second), or chapterIndex to extract a specific chapter.

key.description: The signing secret for verifying webhook payloads

doc_url.description: Link to documentation for this error

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

ExportStatus.description: Status of a video export job

downloadUrl.description: Download URL when export is completed, null otherwise

exportId.description: Unique identifier for the export job

progress.description: Export progress percentage (0-100), null if not started

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of last status update

ExportVideoRequest.description: Request body for exporting a video

fps.description: Frames per second. 60fps may require paid plan.

granularity.description: Export granularity: video (full video), clips (one file per clip), raw (original uploads)

FullscreenLayout.description: Single-layer fullscreen. Camera-subject clips take an optional `style` (regular/stretch); basic-subject clips take an optional `screenFit`.

screenFit.description: Only honoured for basic-subject clips (Tella renders the screen fullscreen). Defaults to cover.

style.description: Only honoured for camera-subject clips: `regular` (default) is plain fullscreen, `stretch` stretches the subject. Ignored on basic-subject clips.

FullscreenLayout.title: Fullscreen

GetClipResponse.description: Response shape for a single clip

LayoutSceneType.description: How a clip composes its layers, which determines the set of layouts it accepts: `basicSubject` (screen-only), `cameraSubject` (camera-only), or `combi` (camera + presentation).

LayoutTransitionStyle.description: How the editor transitions into this layout from the previous one. `spring` is the default smooth motion; `hardCut` is an instant cut.
LayoutTransitionStyle.title: LayoutTransitionStyle

ListClipsResponse.description: Response shape for listing clips of a video

clips.description: Clips in the video, ordered by `order`

ListMessagesResponse.description: Response containing a list of webhook messages

MaskPoint.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

MaskPointOutput.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

MiddleLayout.description: Centered subject. Camera-subject clips take a `shape`; basic-subject clips take no fields.

shape.description: Required for camera-subject clips. Ignored for basic-subject clips.

MiddleLayout.title: Middle

Pagination.description: Pagination metadata for list responses. Results are sorted by updatedAt descending.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to fetch

nextCursor.description: Cursor for next page. Pass this value as the 'cursor' query parameter to fetch the next page. Null if no more pages. This is an opaque value - do not decode or modify it.

description.example: A collection of tutorial videos for our product

emoji.description: Unicode emoji character for the playlist

searchEngineIndexingEnabled.description: Whether search engines can index this playlist

videos.description: Number of videos in the playlist

visibility.description: Whether playlist is shared with org or personal to creator

PlaylistLinkScope.description: Access level: public (anyone with link), private (org members only), password (requires password), embedonly (only viewable when embedded)

viewPage.description: URL to view the playlist on Tella

PlaylistListItem.description: Playlist item in a list response

description.example: A collection of tutorial videos for our product

emoji.description: Unicode emoji character for the playlist

searchEngineIndexingEnabled.description: Whether search engines can index this playlist

videos.description: Number of videos in the playlist

visibility.description: Whether playlist is shared with org or personal to creator

PlaylistVisibility.description: Visibility: org (shared with entire organization) or personal (only creator)

ReorderClipRequest.description: Move a clip to a new position. Other clips are renumbered to keep ordering contiguous.

order.description: New position for the clip (0 = first)

ScreenOnlyLayout.description: Screen fills the frame or sits centered; the camera is hidden. Combi (all ratios).

screenFit.description: Only honoured when `style: "fullscreen"`. Defaults to cover.

style.description: `fullscreen` fills the frame with the screen (optional `screenFit`); `middle` centers the screen.

ScreenOnlyLayout.title: Screen Only

Sentence.description: A sentence from the transcript with timestamps

text.example: Hello and welcome to this tutorial.

SideBySideLayout.description: Camera and screen side by side. Combi (all ratios). Landscape splits horizontally (`position: left/right`, style regular/even/overlap); portrait and square split vertically 50/50 (`position: top/bottom` for the camera half, `style: even` only).

position.description: Where the camera sits. `left`/`right` on landscape clips; `top`/`bottom` on portrait and square clips.

size.description: Camera size. Required when `style: "overlap"`; ignored otherwise.

style.description: `regular` weights camera and screen unevenly, `even` splits 50/50, `overlap` lets the camera bleed over the screen edge (and requires `size`). Portrait and square clips support `even` only.

SideBySideLayout.title: Side by Side

SilenceRange.description: A contiguous range of silent audio in scene-playback time

SourceWaveformResponse.description: Audio waveform data for a source, in BBC audiowaveform JSON format. Use the `data` array to render a custom waveform visualization.

data.description: Raw audio level data (BBC audiowaveform format)

SuccessResponse.description: Standard success response for operations that don't return data

TVPresenterLayout.description: Today-show layout: presenter on one side, screen on the other. Combi (landscape) only.

style.description: `regular` is the standard today-show framing, `full` puts the screen fullscreen behind the presenter, `overlap` tightens the camera-screen overlap.

TVPresenterLayout.title: TV Presenter

ThumbnailFormats.description: Thumbnail URLs in various formats for a specific size

gif.description: Animated GIF thumbnail URL (medium and small sizes only)

mp4.description: Animated MP4 thumbnail URL (medium and small sizes only)

ThumbnailResponse.description: Signed CDN URL for the requested thumbnail. Returned only when `?response=json` is set; otherwise the endpoint redirects to the URL with a 302.

Thumbnails.description: Video thumbnails organized by size, with format options for each

medium.description: Medium thumbnails with animated formats (640x360 landscape, 360x640 portrait, 640x640 square)

small.description: Small thumbnails with animated formats (320x180 landscape, 180x320 portrait, 320x320 square)

xl.description: Extra large thumbnails (1920x1080 landscape, 1080x1920 portrait, 1080x1080 square)

text.example: Hello and welcome to this tutorial...

hidden.description: Whether the word is hidden by an edit

index.description: Stable index of the word in the source recording

TranscriptWordRange.description: A range of words to cut, identified by indices from the clip's uncut transcript.

fromWordIndex.description: Index of the first word to cut (inclusive), as reported by the uncut transcript.

toWordIndex.description: Index of the last word to cut (inclusive), as reported by the uncut transcript.

TrimRequest.description: Trim parameters. Use either startTime+endTime for time range or chapterIndex for chapter extraction.

chapterIndex.description: Index of the chapter to extract (0-based). Cannot be combined with startTime/endTime. Get chapter count from the video's chapters array.

endTime.description: End time in seconds for the trimmed video. Required when using time range trim.

startTime.description: Start time in seconds for the trimmed video. Required when using time range trim.

UncutClipTranscriptResponse.description: Clip transcript on the source recording timeline.

words.description: Words on the original recording timeline (cuts NOT applied).

UpdateClipLayoutRequest.description: Update an existing layout on a clip

media.description: Replace the layout's media content. Only valid on time-ranged layouts; rejected on the base (clip-spanning) layout.

transitionStyle.description: Only valid on time-ranged layouts; rejected on the base (clip-spanning) layout.

UpdateClipRequest.description: Request body for updating a clip. At least one field must be provided.

cuts.description: Replaces the clip's cuts. Total cut duration must be less than `maxDurationSeconds`.

order.description: New position of the clip within the video

type.description: `manualZoom` zooms into a fixed `focusPoint` on the screen. `trackingZoom` automatically follows the cursor in the screen recording.

UpdatePlaylistRequest.description: Request body for updating a playlist. At least one field must be provided.

password.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

UpdateVideoRequest.description: Request body for updating a video. At least one field must be provided.

allowedEmbedDomains.description: Restrict embedding to these domains only (Premium feature). Empty array allows all domains.

commentEmailsEnabled.description: Send email notifications for new comments

defaultPlaybackRate.description: Default playback speed (0.5-2.0). Viewers can still adjust.

dimensions.description: Canvas size in pixels. Changing it also remaps every clip and section layout to a ratio-appropriate equivalent (clips using a custom layout fall back to a standard one), exactly like switching size in the editor's Setup → Size. No-op when the video already has the requested size. The editor's presets: 1920x1080 (16:9), 1920x1200 (16:10), 1440x1080 (4:3), 1080x1080 (1:1), 1080x1350 (4:5), 1080x1920 (9:16).

downloadsEnabled.description: Allow viewers to download the video

linkScope.description: Access level: public (anyone with link), private (org members only), password (requires password), embedonly (only viewable when embedded)

password.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

publishDateEnabled.description: Show publish date on video page

rawDownloadsEnabled.description: Allow viewers to download raw source files

searchEngineIndexingEnabled.description: Allow search engines to index the video page

viewCountEnabled.description: Show view count on video page

VideoDetail.description: Detailed information about a video including chapters, transcript, and exports

clipIds.description: Ordered IDs of the clips in the video. Use `/v1/videos/{id}/clips/{clipId}` to fetch each one.

description.example: Learn how to create and share your first video

playlistIds.description: IDs of playlists containing this video

thumbnails.description: Available thumbnail URLs by format and resolution

viewPage.description: URL to view the video on Tella

VideoListItem.description: Video item in a list response

description.example: Learn how to create and share your first video

allowedEmbedDomains.description: Restrict embedding to these domains only (Premium feature). Empty array allows all domains.

commentEmailsEnabled.description: Send email notifications for new comments

defaultPlaybackRate.description: Default playback speed (0.5-2.0). Viewers can still adjust.

downloadsEnabled.description: Allow viewers to download the video

linkScope.description: Access level: public (anyone with link), private (org members only), password (requires password), embedonly (only viewable when embedded)

publishDateEnabled.description: Show publish date on video page

rawDownloadsEnabled.description: Allow viewers to download raw source files

searchEngineIndexingEnabled.description: Allow search engines to index the video page

viewCountEnabled.description: Show view count on video page

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred

ZoomFocusPoint.description: Point on the screen recording to zoom into, expressed as percentages of the screen dimensions. Required for `manualZoom`; ignored for `trackingZoom`.

xPct.description: Horizontal position on the screen frame (0-100). 0 = left edge.

yPct.description: Vertical position on the screen frame (0-100). 0 = top edge.

ZoomFocusPointOutput.description: Point on the screen recording to zoom into, expressed as percentages of the screen dimensions. Required for `manualZoom`; ignored for `trackingZoom`.

xPct.description: Horizontal position on the screen frame (0-100). 0 = left edge.

yPct.description: Vertical position on the screen frame (0-100). 0 = top edge.

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained from your Tella account settings

info.description:
The Tella Public API allows you to programmatically access your videos and playlists, including transcripts, chapters, and thumbnails.

## Authentication

All requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer tella_pk_xxxxx...
```

API keys can be generated in your Tella workspace settings.

## Rate Limiting

The API is rate-limited to 100 requests per minute per organization.
Rate limit information is returned in response headers:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Maximum requests per window
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`: Remaining requests in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`: Unix timestamp when the window resets
info.title: Tella Public API

get.summary: Get the audio waveform JSON for a source

get.description: Returns a signed CDN URL for a still image (jpg/png/webp) or animated preview (gif/mp4) of a clip. By default returns a 302 redirect to the URL — set `?response=json` to get `{url}` JSON instead. `inpointMs` is clip-relative (recording time, ignores cuts). `durationMs` only applies to gif/mp4.

parameters.description: Frame offset in ms from the clip's start. Defaults to 0.

parameters.description: Output height in pixels. Derived from the video's aspect ratio when omitted.

get.description: Returns a signed CDN URL for a still image (jpg/png/webp) or animated preview (gif/mp4) of a video at a video-relative time. By default returns a 302 redirect — set `?response=json` to get `{url}` JSON instead.

parameters.description: Frame offset in ms from the clip's start. Defaults to 0.
parameters.name: inpointMs

schema.description: Frame offset in ms from the clip's start. Defaults to 0.

parameters.description: Duration of the animated preview in ms. Only valid when format is gif or mp4.
parameters.name: durationMs

schema.description: Duration of the animated preview in ms. Only valid when format is gif or mp4.

parameters.description: Output width in pixels. The thumbnail keeps the video's aspect ratio; a missing side is derived from it.
parameters.name: width

schema.description: Output width in pixels. The thumbnail keeps the video's aspect ratio; a missing side is derived from it.

parameters.description: Output height in pixels. Derived from the video's aspect ratio when omitted.
parameters.name: height

schema.description: Output height in pixels. Derived from the video's aspect ratio when omitted.

parameters.description: Suggest a download disposition on the signed URL.
parameters.name: download

schema.description: Suggest a download disposition on the signed URL.

parameters.description: Set to 'json' to receive `{url}` instead of the default 302 redirect.
parameters.name: response

schema.description: Set to 'json' to receive `{url}` instead of the default 302 redirect.

302.description: Redirect to the signed CDN URL
